reviews.comment:
Pasamos el lunes 28/2 a las 23y30 y el buffet ya estaba cerrado, me pareció raro...era dentro de todo temprano para comer algo.

(Translated by Google)
We went on Monday, February 28th at 11:30 pm and the buffet was already closed, which I found strange...it was still early to eat something.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Habitaciones cómodas. Mejor muchísimo mejor que la atención de YPF fraga san Luis. que únicamente me atendió bien el playero. Después en el servicompras ni saludaron. Pedían permiso a una pierna y después a la otra para caminar

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Comfortable rooms. Much better than the service at the YPF Fraga San Luis station, where only the attendant was helpful. At the convenience store, they didn't even say hello. They kept asking permission to walk, first with one leg and then the other.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNGE2T0t3EAE
